description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof, set on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The exterior walls are primarily composed of reddish-brown brick, and the house features large, modern windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a prominent glass entry door and a wide window, while the side and rear elevations have a mix of smaller and larger windows, providing varied light and views. The garage is integrated into the structure, accessible via the driveway, and there is a secondary door at the back. The roof is flat and unadorned, consistent with a modern or mid-century architectural style. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and an integrated garage on a green lawn with a paved driveway. The design is clean and functional, emphasizing geometric lines and natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large front window, garage entrance, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary door, a large window, and the back portion of the driveway and lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with several windows and a clear view of the flat roof and brick facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Glass front door with a paved approach, no porch or overhang, minimalistic modern style
